24780.title: Airliner crashes in Nigeria
24780.extract:
Monday, October 24, 2005
 
Bellview Airlines Flight 210 has crashed in Lagos, Nigeria. The Boeing 737 was carrying over 100 passengers.
The plane took off from the International Airport in Lagos for the capital Abuja at 8:45pm and lost contact with the control tower five minutes later.


Sources
Tom Ashby. Nigeria mourns plane crash victims — Reuters, 23 October, 2005
 117 Feared Dead In Nigerian Crash — AP/CBC News, 23 October, 2005
 Nigeria Plane on Internal Flight Crashes; All 117 Aboard Die — Bloomsberg, 23 October, 2005
